steps.title: Identifying the growth factor
steps.content: When the number of customers is 8% greater than the previous month, we keep all 100% of the previous value and add 8% more. This gives us 100% + 8% = 108% = 1.08. So each month, the customer count is multiplied by 1.08.

steps.title: Building the exponential formula
steps.content:
Starting with 700 customers in January 2018 (where $m = 0$), each subsequent month multiplies by 1.08:

After 1 month: $700 \times 1.08$
After 2 months: $700 \times (1.08)^2$
After $m$ months: $$c = 700(1.08)^m$$

This matches choice B — B is correct.
